all.title: Wall 7 — the naive ℤ/3 triality does not act on H¹(D;27) ("the rebase")
all.rationale: Killed by two standard structural facts: the E₆ center acts on the 27 as the scalar ω (Schur's-lemma-type — a scalar action splits nothing, not a trace cancellation), and non-central order-3 elements provably fail to commute with the holonomy (Coxeter scaling, checked by direct non-commutation, not by a vanishing trace sum). Neither fact is a par/character projection that could hide a θ-odd analog; the obstruction is algebraic (scalar-center + non-commutation), not computational cancellation.

all.title: Wall 8 — THE TOTAL MIRROR WALL (B643/B658)
all.rationale: The intertwiner space was computed BLOCK-BY-BLOCK on the principal-SL(2) isotypic decomposition (Sym^16 ⊕ Sym^8 ⊕ Sym^0, the object's own θ-graded pieces) with dimension vector d=(0,0,1) — each theta-graded block checked individually, not summed/differenced into a single par. This is already the chord-granular check the campaign is hunting for elsewhere; there is no summed trace that could be masking a nonzero Sym^16 or Sym^8 contribution.

all.title: Wall 9 — THE EQUIVARIANCE WALL (B644/B650, Sylvester T=0)
all.rationale: Solved the FULL Sylvester equation T·A1 = ρ_hear(RL)·T for every entry of the intertwiner matrix T (not a trace or scalar projection of T) and found T=0 the unique solution, explained by disjoint spectra (infinite-order hyperbolic vs finite-order congruence). Since the whole matrix — already mapping into the θ-odd hearing plane — was solved for directly, the computation is already at chord/structural granularity; no cancellation of a summed quantity is possible here.

all.title: Wall 10 — THE DIMENSIONFUL NO-GO / scale-torsor no-go (B660/S3, B666 cellS)
all.rationale: Hom(G, ℝ₊) = 0 for finite/profinite G is a torsion-vs-torsion-free group-theory fact (verified exactly on several concrete groups: Gal(L/ℚ(i)), 2I, PSL(2,7), 2I×ℤ/3, SL(2,ℤ/15), W(E6)) — a structural no-go independent of any trace/character projection; this is exactly the instructions' own example of a B766-immune structural negative.

all.title: Wall 11 (headline) — THE STRUCTURAL-BRIDGE NO-MATCH, rung 1 + rung 2 (B706)
all.rationale: Rung 1 (PSLQ algebraicity of SM ratios over Q(sqrt5)) is a Diophantine integer-relation search on already-scalar real numbers, not a par/trace projection subject to even/odd cancellation. Rung 2 (discrete F2-seam vs continuous ~19-param SM moduli) is an explicit cardinality/dimension-type mismatch (finite set vs positive-dimensional manifold) — exactly the instructions' 'order/cardinality mismatch' example of a structural negative. Neither rung's zero result is a trace-cancellation artifact.

all.title: B743 Part 1 — rung-1 widened algebraic sweep, 6 bases × 18 PDG targets, 0 gated hits
all.rationale: PSLQ integer-relation detection across the object's real algebraic tower (Q(sqrt3), Q(sqrt15), Q(zeta15)+, Q(zeta20)+, Q(sqrtphi), Q(sqrt5)) against 18 calibrated SM targets. The compared quantities are already-scalar real numbers (masses ratios, Koide Q, alpha^-1, etc.); the null is a base-rate-calibrated Diophantine non-match, not a par=tr_even-tr_odd computation, so there is no natural theta-odd analog whose cancellation could be hiding a hit. Genuinely the program's headline 'rung-1 sweep, zero hits' negative.

all.title: B743 Part 2 — the L-function/analytic sweep (L(E,2), L'(E,0), L(E,1), Mahler, Beilinson combos), 0/126 hits
all.rationale: Compared a pre-named list of analytic L-function special values and regulator/Mahler-measure combinations of the figure-eight's associated curve 15A8 against the 18 SM targets at +/-1 sigma — again a Diophantine/near-hit comparison of scalar analytic constants, not a group-representation trace/character/par computation; the L(E,2) vs Koide near-miss was independently recomputed and shown to be 683-sigma apart (not a near-hit). This is the program's 'L-function sweep, zero matches' headline negative; no chord-vs-trace decomposition applies to an L-value.

rank.note:
STRUCTURAL COUNT: 174 scanned − 45 flagged chord-blind = 129 STRUCTURAL / B766-immune (correctly not candidates). This bounds the campaign: only ~26% (45/174) of the banked-negatives base was ever at projection risk; ~74% is projection-immune, so the maximum blast radius of any chord recompute is ≤45 negatives.

DEDUP: the 45 flagged collapse to 34 distinct underlying negatives via 9 merges — B307 trace-field {OI-129+OI-165+E6-B307}, Molien 5-adic {A4+A5+A6}, T3 sector-S {OI-132+OI-345}, Procesi/B85 tower {OI-010+OI-089}, ℚ(ζ12) fusion {W3-067+W4-067r}, chiral-index B565-T3 {E5+W5-T3}, equivariance/param-reduce {E9+D16}, complexified-trace-map {OI-069+OI-002}, SM-value umbrella {E1+W1}. RANKING BASIS: LOAD-BEARING first, then W4-304 overturn plausibility — the signature being a scalar / par / character-inner-product / abelianized quantity reading ZERO over a plausibly-nonzero richer chord object (masked even=odd cancellation, not genuine vanishing). Ties broken by cross-reference centrality and c-vs-θ-crux proximity. Ranks 1–3 are the cases where the overturn is already partly demonstrated in-record (E5 near-miss winding explained away; W2 cup classes nonzero where the contracted cubic is zero) or hits the flagship crux head-on (OI-169 CP-sign = 'can c be carried into θ'). All 12 are LOAD-BEARING.
